title: 10 best herbal teas for difficulty eating
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra, also known as licorice, teas helps with difficulty eating because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD). The licorice root's flavonoids and saponins may also help to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, making it easier to swallow food and liquids.
